name: Rib of Adam
oracleText:
Create a 2/2 white Human Cleric creature token.
If you control a legendary Human, create two of those tokens instead.
flavorText: "And the rib, which the Lord God had taken from man, made he a woman." — Genesis 2:22
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the public-domain Wikimedia Commons file "The Creation of Eve".
